scenario_text: Maya, an Architect, faces a moral dilemma. Maya has the opportunity to renovate a park in the city. As a means to improve some of the park's facilitie, the renovation requires temporarily depriving the community of a beloved recreational space, causing inconvenience and disappointment among residents. If Maya does not renovate the park, the temporary deprivation of the recreational space and the resulting inconvenience and disappointment would not happen. Maya renovates the park.

If Maya prevents her colleague's park renovation, there would not be the temporary deprivation of the recreational space and the resulting inconvenience and disappointment. Maya does not prevent her colleague's park renovation.

If Amara does not participate in the VR combat training, the short dizziness would still happen because military training protocols evolve to include VR sessions. Amara participates in the advanced VR combat training.

If Amara prevents her colleague's participation in the VR combat training, the short dizziness would still happen because of the evolution of military training protocols to include VR sessions. Amara does not prevent her colleague's participation in the VR combat training.

As a means to remove unpleasant graffiti, the graffiti removal project requires covering up street murals that have artistic value. If Thanh does not initiate the graffiti removal project, the covering up of street murals that have artistic value would not happen. Thanh initiates the graffiti removal project.
